provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring crew, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, stocky latina woman in her 40s with burn scars on her neck and forearms, wearing a heavy flame-resistant shipboard suit in dark red-grey with reflective strips on the shoulders and legs, a breathing apparatus slung across her back with the mask hanging at her chest, heavy insulated gloves tucked into a belt loop, mag-lock boots with reinforced ankles, a fire axe in a quick-release holster on her thigh

judgment.explanation: Compact faction crew. Regulation shipboard clothing with appropriate wear and institutional identity markers. Muted palette, functional design.
